text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...This is strange. Today, I feel as if...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can hear the voices very clearly.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But strangely, it feels like nighttime... They're
fleetingly translucent... and shimmering...
choice_data_list:
It sounds like you'll be able to find a whole new
world.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll go and find it... The end only I can see.
